conversations.content:

Tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, and the operating hours.

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request, I need to follow the trajectory plan laid out, which involves gathering information about restaurants in Paris, specifically searching for those that serve French cuisine and are open on Sunday. I'll start by getting all restaurants in Paris.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean

<function_thought>
I have received the list of restaurants in Paris. Next, I will check the cuisine types for these restaurants to find those that serve French cuisine.
</function_thought>
